What We Offer

Our Services

From boardrooms to ballrooms, airports to altars, Burbank Hire Cars delivers an uncompromising standard of luxury for every occasion.

Our Services

Luxury for Every Occasion

Executive Car Hire

Arrive in commanding style with our premium executive fleet. Ideal for corporate travel, business meetings, and VIP transfers.

Learn More

Wedding Car Hire

Make your special day truly unforgettable with our exquisite wedding car service. Elegance, grace, and impeccable attention to detail.

Learn More

Parties & Nights Out

Turn heads and arrive together. Our party limousines make every celebration an extraordinary event from the very first moment.

Learn More

Airport Transfers

Seamless transfers to Sydney and Newcastle Airport. Punctual, reliable, and stress-free.

Learn More

Cruise Ship Transfers

Seamless port transfers for cruise passengers. Arrive at the terminal relaxed and ready to embark on your voyage.

Learn More

Formal Car Hire

School formals, galas, and black-tie events deserve a grand entrance. Our formal car hire ensures you arrive in spectacular fashion.

Learn More

Premium chauffeur-driven luxury car hire on the Central Coast.
